_comment: VectorMBE JSON graph import — Automotive Powertrain Signal Architecture

attributes.name: Powertrain-CAN-Bus
attributes.description: Primary powertrain controller area network

attributes.name: Chassis-CAN-Bus
attributes.description: Chassis control and ADAS sensor network

attributes.name: Battery-Management-Bus
attributes.description: Isolated BMS communication bus

attributes.name: EngineSpeed
attributes.description: Engine crankshaft rotational speed

attributes.name: EngineTemp
attributes.description: Coolant temperature at engine outlet

attributes.name: ThrottlePos
attributes.description: Throttle pedal position

attributes.name: GearPosition
attributes.description: Current engaged gear

attributes.name: VehicleSpeed
attributes.description: Vehicle ground speed from wheel sensors

attributes.name: PackVoltage
attributes.description: High voltage battery pack total voltage

attributes.name: PackCurrent
attributes.description: High voltage battery pack current

attributes.name: SOC
attributes.description: State of charge from Coulomb counting

attributes.name: MotorSpeed
attributes.description: Electric motor rotational speed

attributes.name: MotorTorque
attributes.description: Commanded motor torque

attributes.name: YawRate
attributes.description: Vehicle rotation rate about vertical axis

attributes.name: LatAccel
attributes.description: Lateral acceleration

attributes.name: SteeringAngle
attributes.description: Steering wheel angle

attributes.name: EngineControlUnit
attributes.description: Primary engine management controller

attributes.name: TransmissionControlUnit
attributes.description: Dual-clutch transmission controller

attributes.name: BatteryManagementMaster
attributes.description: High voltage battery management system master

attributes.name: MotorControlUnit
attributes.description: Traction motor inverter controller

attributes.name: ADASController
attributes.description: Advanced driver assistance system controller

attributes.name: TorqueManagement
attributes.description: Coordinate engine and motor torque for optimal efficiency

attributes.name: ThermalManagement
attributes.description: Manage powertrain cooling and battery thermal conditioning

attributes.name: VehicleStabilityControl
attributes.description: Electronic stability control using yaw rate and lateral acceleration

attributes.name: Torque Demand Management
attributes.description: The driver requests acceleration via throttle pedal. The TorqueManagement function reads ThrottlePos and EngineSpeed from the Powertrain-CAN-Bus, arbitrates engine and motor torque demands, and commands the MotorControlUnit within 20 ms.

attributes.name: High-Voltage Battery Protection
attributes.description: The BMS continuously monitors PackVoltage, PackCurrent, and SOC on the Battery-Management-Bus. On detecting an overvoltage or overcurrent condition, it opens the main contactors and broadcasts a fault DTC within 10 ms.

attributes.name: Electronic Stability Control Intervention
attributes.description: During cornering, the ADAS Controller reads YawRate, LatAccel, and SteeringAngle from the Chassis-CAN-Bus. If vehicle trajectory deviates from driver intent, it applies selective braking to individual wheels to restore stability.

attributes.name: Normal Acceleration — Torque Coordination
attributes.description: Driver applies 60% throttle from standstill. ECU reads ThrottlePos (60%) and EngineSpeed (800 rpm idle) at 100 Hz. TorqueManagement computes blended torque split: 40% engine, 60% motor. MCU receives torque command within 15 ms. Vehicle accelerates smoothly to target speed.
attributes.precondition: Vehicle at standstill, SOC > 30%, engine at idle, no fault DTCs active
attributes.postcondition: Target torque achieved, all signals within nominal range, no fault events
attributes.steps: 1. Driver depresses throttle to 60% | 2. ThrottlePos broadcast on Powertrain-CAN-Bus | 3. TorqueManagement receives signal (≤2 ms) | 4. Compute torque arbitration | 5. Issue motor torque command to MCU | 6. MCU ramps motor current | 7. MotorTorque feedback confirms target reached

attributes.name: Battery Overvoltage Fault — Contactor Trip
attributes.description: During regenerative braking at high SOC, PackVoltage rises toward 422 V. BMS detects threshold breach (>420 V), immediately opens main contactors, sets DTC P0A0F, and broadcasts fault frame on Battery-Management-Bus within 10 ms.
attributes.precondition: SOC > 95%, regenerative braking active, coolant temperature nominal
attributes.postcondition: Main contactors open, regen disabled, DTC logged, driver alert active
attributes.steps: 1. Regen braking raises PackVoltage | 2. BMS reads PackVoltage at 10 Hz | 3. Voltage threshold 420 V exceeded | 4. BMS triggers contactor open command (≤5 ms) | 5. Motor regen disabled | 6. DTC P0A0F set and broadcast | 7. Instrument cluster alert illuminated

attributes.name: ESC Intervention — Oversteer Correction
attributes.description: Vehicle enters a high-speed corner at 80 km/h. Rear loses traction; YawRate rises 8 deg/s above model prediction. ADAS Controller detects deviation, applies front-left brake 40 bar within 12 ms to restore yaw moment. SteeringAngle confirms driver correction.
attributes.precondition: Vehicle speed > 60 km/h, ESC enabled, no sensor faults on chassis-bus
attributes.postcondition: Yaw rate returned to predicted value ±2 deg/s, no wheel lockup, driver alerted via HMI
attributes.steps: 1. YawRate and LatAccel sampled at 100 Hz | 2. ADAS detects yaw deviation > 4 deg/s | 3. ESC intervention triggered | 4. Selective brake pressure applied to front-left (40 bar, ≤12 ms) | 5. VehicleSpeed and YawRate monitored for convergence | 6. Intervention released when deviation < 1 deg/s | 7. ESC event logged to DTC memory

attributes.name: EngineSpeed Signal Accuracy
attributes.description: When the engine is running, the ECU shall transmit EngineSpeed with an accuracy of ±25 rpm at a rate of 100 Hz on the Powertrain-CAN-Bus.

attributes.name: HV Battery Overvoltage Protection
attributes.description: The BMS shall assert a fault and open the battery contactors within 10 ms when PackVoltage exceeds 420 V or PackCurrent exceeds 300 A.

attributes.name: Torque Demand Response Latency
attributes.description: When the driver applies throttle, the TorqueManagement function shall command the motor controller within 20 ms of receiving ThrottlePos on the Powertrain-CAN-Bus.

attributes.name: Engine Overheat Shutdown
attributes.description: While EngineTemp exceeds 210 degC, the ThermalManagement function shall reduce engine load to 30% of maximum within 500 ms and generate a DTC.

attributes.name: ESC Activation on Yaw Deviation
attributes.description: When the measured YawRate deviates from the model-predicted value by more than 4 deg/s, the VehicleStabilityControl function shall apply selective wheel braking within 15 ms.

attributes.name: State-of-Charge Accuracy
attributes.description: The BMS shall maintain SOC estimation accuracy within ±3% across the full operating temperature range of -20 degC to 60 degC.

attributes.name: Powertrain CAN Bus Fault Tolerance
attributes.description: The Powertrain-CAN-Bus shall maintain message delivery within 5 ms end-to-end latency under a bus load of up to 70% with no single-point failures causing loss of safety-critical signals.

attributes.name: Lateral Stability Envelope
attributes.description: Where the vehicle is operating above 30 km/h, the VehicleStabilityControl function shall prevent lateral acceleration from exceeding 0.8 g during normal maneuvers.

attributes.name: ADAS Sensor Degradation Notification
attributes.description: When a chassis-bus sensor signal is absent for more than 100 ms, the ADAS Controller shall switch to degraded mode and alert the driver via the instrument cluster within 500 ms.
